meta.primaryBenefit: save time and make better decisions

openingCard.title: Keeping track of user access across departments eats up hours and often leads to outdated
openingCard.subtitle: save time and make better decisions

scenes.title: Real-Time Device Monitoring
scenes.salesHook: Track device status and fleet health instantly on a dynamic dashboard
scenes.narration: Monitor your entire IoT fleet at a glance, with color-coded status indicators and real-time data visualizations. Instantly identify issues, analyze device performance, and locate devices on the interactive map to boost operational efficiency and minimize downtime.
scenes.description: Monitor your entire IoT fleet at a glance, with color-coded status indicators and real-time data visualizations. Instantly identify issues, analyze device performance, and locate devices on the interactive map to boost operational efficiency and minimize downtime.

scenes.title: Device Fleet Dashboard
scenes.salesHook: Monitor and analyze all device types in one unified view
scenes.narration: This dashboard presents a real-time overview of device health, breakouts by type, and geolocated alerts on a dynamic map. Instantly spot issues, track sensor data, and prioritize maintenance efficiently with actionable insights.
scenes.description: This dashboard presents a real-time overview of device health, breakouts by type, and geolocated alerts on a dynamic map. Instantly spot issues, track sensor data, and prioritize maintenance efficiently with actionable insights.

scenes.title: Device Management Grid
scenes.salesHook: Easily monitor and configure all devices from one dashboard
scenes.narration: This grid view displays all your connected devices with key details like status, ID, and usage statistics, making bulk monitoring and management effortless. Instantly spot offline units, access configuration, and filter devices to streamline operational oversight.
scenes.description: This grid view displays all your connected devices with key details like status, ID, and usage statistics, making bulk monitoring and management effortless. Instantly spot offline units, access configuration, and filter devices to streamline operational oversight.

scenes.title: Site Directory Overview
scenes.salesHook: Instant visibility into all enterprise sites at a glance
scenes.narration: This feature provides a visual directory of all enterprise sites, allowing users to quickly see site names, locations, and available action items. It streamlines management by offering immediate access to essential site-specific functions and details.
scenes.description: This feature provides a visual directory of all enterprise sites, allowing users to quickly see site names, locations, and available action items. It streamlines management by offering immediate access to essential site-specific functions and details.

scenes.title: Alarm Management Dashboard
scenes.salesHook: Instantly view, filter, and resolve hardware fleet alarms
scenes.narration: This dashboard centralizes all active and resolved alarms for your hardware fleet, categorizing them by urgency and type for rapid action. Clear color-coded tags and filters enable teams to prioritize critical issues and track ongoing maintenance.
scenes.description: This dashboard centralizes all active and resolved alarms for your hardware fleet, categorizing them by urgency and type for rapid action. Clear color-coded tags and filters enable teams to prioritize critical issues and track ongoing maintenance.

scenes.title: Content Report Analytics
scenes.salesHook: Visualize historical and current site content quality metrics instantly
scenes.narration: The Content Report feature charts multiple quality scores like comprehensiveness, accuracy, and freshness over time, providing a clear historical perspective on content performance. Easily track trends and pinpoint issues to optimize site quality and drive better SEO outcomes.
scenes.description: The Content Report feature charts multiple quality scores like comprehensiveness, accuracy, and freshness over time, providing a clear historical perspective on content performance. Easily track trends and pinpoint issues to optimize site quality and drive better SEO outcomes.

scenes.title: AI Predictive Analysis
scenes.salesHook: Spot and prioritize urgent equipment issues before failures happen
scenes.narration: This feature delivers an AI-driven dashboard that highlights predictive equipment issues like connectivity, temperature, and part failures. Teams can quickly approve or create work orders, minimizing downtime and optimizing maintenance workflows.
scenes.description: This feature delivers an AI-driven dashboard that highlights predictive equipment issues like connectivity, temperature, and part failures. Teams can quickly approve or create work orders, minimizing downtime and optimizing maintenance workflows.

scenes.title: User Management Dashboard
scenes.salesHook: Easily monitor user roles, statuses, and organizations in one view
scenes.narration: The dashboard provides a consolidated list of all users, displaying their roles, account status, assigned organizations, and access levels. This makes it easy for admins to manage permissions and quickly identify and address access issues, ensuring security and compliance across teams.
scenes.description: The dashboard provides a consolidated list of all users, displaying their roles, account status, assigned organizations, and access levels. This makes it easy for admins to manage permissions and quickly identify and address access issues, ensuring security and compliance across teams.

scenes.title: Air Analytics Model
scenes.salesHook: Optimize air system efficiency with real-time predictive analytics
scenes.narration: This feature visualizes air flow, temperature, and efficiency using live modeled data, helping users monitor and adjust system parameters instantly to prevent downtime and maximize operational effectiveness.
scenes.description: This feature visualizes air flow, temperature, and efficiency using live modeled data, helping users monitor and adjust system parameters instantly to prevent downtime and maximize operational effectiveness.

brollScenes.subtitle: Unplanned failures drain budgets and teams
Keeping track of user access across departments eats up hours
Manual ai failure predictions grid processes take hours, every day

bullets.label: User Directory Table
bullets.description: With User Directory Table, your team can quickly find, review, and update any user's access in seconds.

bullets.label: Real-Time Alert Panel
bullets.description: With Real-Time Alert Panel, your team can spot and act on every critical incident the moment it appears.

bullets.label: Quick User Onboarding
bullets.description: With Quick User Onboarding, your team can add new hires in seconds.

bullets.label: Energy and Cost KPIs
bullets.description: With Energy and Cost KPIs, your team can see exactly where energy and money go.

bullets.label: Energy and Cost Metrics
bullets.description: With Energy and Cost Metrics, your team can see which devices use the most power — and which cost you extra.

presenterClose.tagline: Platform turns every data point into a prevention
